features: Luxury 300 ml shower crème and body wash
Baylis & Harding's iconic Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit fragrance
Not tested on animals or contains animal derived materials. Suitable for Vegans
description: Product Description Immerse yourself in beautiful citrus burst fragrance and indulgent bathing formulas. This trio of shower crème, body wash and hand & body lotion Is perfect to gift to any loved one who deserves a luxury pamper. Art deco design meets timeless luxury with our enduring Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit collection. Our most iconic fragrance, composed with beautiful jasmine and layered with sparkling citrus top notes brings a luxe dimension to this classic assortment. An elegant monochrome palette coupled with a honeycomb geometric print masterfully accented with gold foil accents, perfectly finesses this seasonal collection. Timeless, always understated and elegant; Sweet Mandarin & Grapefruit is our most iconic and best-selling fragrance. Enduring in its appeal, its subtle fragrance, a blend of jasmine and orange with sparkling top notes of sweet mandarin, grapefruit and lemon. Ingredients Body Wash: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Limonene, Linalool, Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 14700 (Red 4). Hand & Body Lotion: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin,Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Limonene, Linalool, Citral, Eugenolshower Crème: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate,Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate,Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Limonene, Linalool,Ci 19140 (Yellow 5), Ci 16035 (Red 40). Directions BODY WASH/SHOWER CREME - LATHER AND RINSE. HAND & BODY LOTION - MASSAGE GENTLY INTO SKIN UNTIL FULLY ABSORBED Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. See more
